code:
%%{Security_IntrusionDetection}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (Security_IntrusionDetection)

[Security_ZeroTrust] --> OUT_OF_SYNC : SyncRequested (Security_OAuth2)
note right of OUT_OF_SYNC
  Local hub detects divergence from federation:  
  • stale CRDT frame  
  • missing contributions or metrics  
  • network topology change  
end note

OUT_OF_SYNC --> FETCH_REMOTE : BeginSync
note right of FETCH_REMOTE
  Retrieve latest CRDT vector clocks and state diffs  
  from federation peers (Security_Encryption)  
end note

FETCH_REMOTE --> MERGE : FrameDownloaded
note right of MERGE
  Apply CRDT merge function  
  Resolve conflicts deterministically  
  Ensure convergence on shared state
end note

MERGE --> VALIDATE : MergeCompleted
note right of VALIDATE
  Run schema + hash integrity checks  
  Validate contribution and governance deltas  
  Verify signatures from remote hubs  
end note

VALIDATE --> SYNCED : SyncConfirmed (Security_Firewall)
note right of SYNCED
  Federation state consistent  
  Metrics & proposals aligned with global ledger  
end note

SYNCED --> [Security_IntrusionDetection]

%% ---- Exceptional paths ----
FETCH_REMOTE --> FAILED : NetworkTimeout / AuthError
MERGE --> FAILED : ConflictUnresolved
VALIDATE --> FAILED : HashMismatch / SignatureInvalid
FAILED --> RETRY : RetryScheduled
RETRY --> OUT_OF_SYNC : RetrySync

%% ---- Maintenance / background ----
SYNCED --> OUT_OF_SYNC : PeriodicSync / ParamChange
OUT_OF_SYNC --> DEGRADED : HubOffline / LatencyHigh
DEGRADED --> [Security_ZeroTrust] : EscalatedToOps

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class OUT_OF_SYNC,FETCH_REMOTE,MERGE,VALIDATE,SYNCED,FAILED,RETRY,DEGRADED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为联邦式Hub同步设计一个安全状态机，核心是处理本地Hub与联邦节点之间的CRDT状态同步。起点应该是Security_ZeroTrust，当检测到分歧时进入OUT_OF_SYNC状态。
确认一下，OUT_OF_SYNC的触发条件包括哪些？我看到有stale CRDT frame、missing contributions or metrics，还有network topology change，对吗？另外这个状态转换需要Security_OAuth2授权？
对，SyncRequested事件触发，必须携带Security_OAuth2令牌。然后进入FETCH_REMOTE，这里要用Security_Encryption拉取远程的CRDT向量时钟和状态差异。
好的，FETCH_REMOTE之后是MERGE状态，我标注了FrameDownloaded作为转换条件。MERGE节点需要说明是应用CRDT merge函数并确保收敛。
MERGE完成后进入VALIDATE，这里要做三件事：schema和hash完整性检查、验证governance deltas，还要verify signatures from remote hubs。通过之后才是SYNCED。
异常路径我梳理一下：FETCH_REMOTE可能因NetworkTimeout或AuthError进入FAILED；MERGE可能ConflictUnresolved失败；VALIDATE可能HashMismatch或SignatureInvalid失败。这些FAILED都走RETRY回到OUT_OF_SYNC，对吗？
没错。另外补充维护场景：SYNCED可以因PeriodicSync或ParamChange回到OUT_OF_SYNC；还有DEGRADED状态，当HubOffline或LatencyHigh时从OUT_OF_SYNC进入，最终escalated to ops回到Security_ZeroTrust。
完成。所有核心状态OUT_OF_SYNC、FETCH_REMOTE、MERGE、VALIDATE、SYNCED、FAILED、RETRY、DEGRADED都应用了core样式，SYNCED最终连接到Security_IntrusionDetection作为监控终点。
